about.title: Who We Are
about.description: <bold>Establisher</bold>, is a UAE Based Global Business Consultancy simplifying Global business setup. From company formation and banking advisory to tax consultancy, marketing services, and Golden & Freelance Visas, we provide complete, reliable solutions. Our expert team ensures smooth processes, regulatory compliance, and strategic guidance to help entrepreneurs confidently launch and grow their ventures.
about.mission_desc: Our mission is to become the trusted partner businesses rely on to confidently enter new markets, scale operations effectively, and create sustainable long-term value. Through strategic planning and seamless execution support, we deliver solutions that are practical, efficient, and carefully designed to evolve alongside your business growth.
about.vision_desc: Our vision is to redefine excellence in global business consulting by combining international standards, strong regional expertise, and an unwavering commitment to client success. We aim not only to advise organizations but to equip them with the clarity, confidence, and strategic tools needed to lead in competitive markets.

services.title: Tailored End-to-End Solutions
services.description: We provide a complete suite of professional services designed to support your business at every stage of its global journey.

strategy.title: Business Strategy
strategy.desc: Navigate company set up Globally with expert guidance on structure, licensing, compliance, and market strategy.

angel.title: Business Angel
angel.desc: Tax guidance in global markets, covering structure, compliance, and innovative tax planning for sustainable growth.

digital_marketing.title: Digital Marketing 360
digital_marketing.desc: Elevate your brand with digital marketing services, including social media, content creation, and targeted ad campaigns.

company_formation.title: Company Formation
company_formation.desc: Establishers takes the stress out of company formation by managing the full setup journey, from registration to licensing.

hr_payroll.title: HR & Payroll
hr_payroll.desc: Streamline HR tasks with payroll services, ensuring compliance and efficient employee management for global teams.

finance.title: Finance
finance.desc: We keep your finances clean, compliant, and decision-ready through outsourced accounting, bookkeeping, and reporting.

process.title: How We Work – Simple, Clear, Effective
process.description: From concept to launch, we guide investors and entrepreneurs from around the world in bringing their visions to life...

step1.title: Evaluate
step1.desc: At first, our team assesses the needs of the company and its fundamentals

step2.title: Plan
step2.desc: Then, our experts review the best structure and plan based on your goals

step3.title: Develop
step3.desc: Next, we prepare the required documents and handle each step with care

step4.title: Deploy
step4.desc: Finally, we complete the process and guide you through every final step

0.title: Strategic Insight
0.desc: We combine visionary strategy with practical tactical execution, enabling businesses and brands to grow, scale, and succeed in competitive international markets.

1.title: Dedicated Experts
1.desc: Our team offers deep industry expertise and tailored support, backed by over 30 years of international business experience across multiple sectors. We operate globally with multilingual capabilities in English, French, German, Afrikaans, and Italian.

2.title: Worldwide Network
2.desc: Through our international partners and offices, we deliver global reach combined with local insight and cultural sensitivity.

3.title: Proven Results
3.desc: We build, establish, and scale highly profitable international businesses and brands.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say About Us

0.text: Their team's expertise was instrumental in navigating complex international markets and achieving remarkable growth.
0.name: Nantes, France

1.text: Exceptional consultancy services! Business Consultancy provided clear insights, tailored solutions, and hands-on support that transformed our operations. Their expertise in strategy, HR, and digital growth is unmatched.

2.text: They helped us expand internationally with seamless strategy and expert guidance. Their team simplified complex processes, improved efficiency, and delivered measurable results.
2.name: Doha, Qatar

3.text: A fantastic experience working with Business Consultancy. Their comprehensive 360-degree approach to business growth, recruitment, and digital strategy empowered our team.

4.text: Their team provided invaluable insights and strategies that propelled our company to new heights in the global market.
